original_text:
### Accessibility (brand-mandated)
- Body copy **≥16px**; bigger is better.
- Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
- Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.
- Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.
- Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.
- Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop. **[GENERAL email]:** animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.
- Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.
- Reference standard: WCAG (wcag.com).

relations.note: Typography rules must co-apply with overall typographic scale and legibility testing requirements.

quotes: Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.

rules.intent: Ensure basic reading accessibility and WCAG alignment across all brand body layouts.
rules.rule_text: Body copy must be 16px or larger (type_scale.body size defaults to 16px) with a minimum line height of 150% (body.line_height = 150%), with more generous line spacing for light-on-dark text environments.

quotes: Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.

rules.intent: Maintain tap accessibility and clarity of inputs for motor-impaired or elderly users.
rules.rule_text: Click/tap targets must be at least 48px (dimension.accessibility.touch_target_min = 48px) to guarantee ease of tap action. Form labels must remain permanently visible, prohibiting placeholder-only or disappearing label styles.

quotes: animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.

rules.intent: Support legacy Outlook clients while protecting sensitive users from endless motion loops.
rules.rule_text: Animated GIFs must display the primary/key message in frame 1 to support environments such as Outlook where only the first frame is displayed. No autoplaying motion should continue for more than approximately 5 seconds without transitioning to/providing a static fallback.

quotes: Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.

rules.intent: Ensure screen reader usability and total content coverage for sensory impaired audiences.
rules.rule_text: All images must include descriptive alt text. All video or audio content must be accompanied by an available transcript, adhering to standard WCAG reference guidelines.

quotes: Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.
Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.

rules.intent: Ensure readability for colorblind and visually impaired audiences in compliance with WCAG standards.
rules.rule_text: Designs must maintain verified color contrast and never rely on color as the sole conveyor of information. All copy must utilize a type scale for strict visual hierarchy and be verified for high legibility.
